title: × agroelymus ungavensis
side_effects: × agroelymus ungavensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. It may also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage and liver failure in rare cases. Additionally, improper use of × agroelymus ungavensis can also cause interactions with certain medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
